overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking away from a rural train station at night into open moonlit countryside. The scene transitions from a lit wooden building with hitched horses to dark rolling fields under a full moon, following a winding dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural train station platform with hitching post

agents.ego_description: walking steadily away from the train station building along the dirt path

notable_agents.action: horses standing tethered to the station hitching post

entered.detail: single-story wooden station building with lit interior and covered platform
two horses standing at the station hitching rail
unpaved trail leading away from the station

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking away from a rural train station at night. The wooden station building with warm interior lighting sits behind, while two horses stand hitched to the right. The camera follows the character along a dirt path into the darkness.

events.description: exits the station area into open countryside as the building passes out of view
passing a wooden signpost with directional arrows at a trail junction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt trail through open fields with the moon ahead

entered.detail: tall wooden post with multiple directional signs
dark mountain range silhouetted against the night sky
bright full moon illuminating the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character walks through open grassland under a bright full moon, leaving the station behind. The landscape opens up to reveal distant mountains. A wooden signpost appears on the left as the character continues along the winding dirt path.

events.description: character pauses briefly to look around at the trail junction
character resumes walking along the path

agents.ego_description: pausing momentarily at a junction before continuing along the creek-side path

entered.detail: small stream with reflective water running parallel to the path
solitary large tree with spreading branches near the creek

segments.scene_description: The character briefly stops at a trail junction before continuing toward a small creek. The path winds through rolling hills with a large oak tree near the water's edge. The moon shifts toward the right as the character progresses deeper into the countryside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the warm glow of a rural train station into the vast, moonlit expanse of the open countryside. It begins by following the character as they walk away from the lit wooden station building and hitched horses, moving along a dirt path that leads into the night. As the station fades into the distance, the landscape opens into wide grasslands under a bright full moon, revealing distant mountains and a wooden signpost along the winding trail. The scene then shifts toward a trail junction and a small creek, where the path weaves through rolling hills past a large oak tree. Finally, the camera continues deeper into the wilderness as the moon shifts position in the sky, leaving the civilization of the station far behind.
